examples: He looked affectionately at his niece.
She was not exactly overjoyed at the prospect of looking after her niece.
Now she's in assisted living, and her niece and nephew are helping with her affairs.
Mr Bourguiba divorced her in 1986, and he was looked after by his niece, Saida Sassi.
Her niece's 6-year-old daughter, Veronica Moser-Sullivan, was the youngest person killed in the rampage.
